summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Darwaza Platform Phase 5 features. All navigation dropdowns, Tourist Guide (4 tabs with real Kuwaiti content), Youth Empowerment (3 tabs with demo courses/jobs), and Kids Page (6 interactive games) are fully functional. Backend: 12/12 tests passed. Frontend: All UI features working correctly.

issues: Minor accessibility warning: DialogContent missing Description for screen readers (non-blocking)

critical_code_review_comments: Navigation refactoring with intuitive dropdowns (Sections and Explore) is well implemented
Tourist data JSON (tourists_data.json) is comprehensive with 4 etiquette sections, 6 dishes, 6 landmarks, 4 social life topics, and 10 phrases
Kids games are interactive and playable with proper game logic
Youth page has realistic demo data for courses with progress tracking and job listings with salary info
seed_data_creation: None - All data served from JSON files
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 5 comprehensive updates complete. Navigation has 2 dropdown menus (Sections: Seniors/Youth/Kids, Explore: Cooking/Tourists/Arab World/Subscriptions). Tourist page has 4 category tabs with real Kuwaiti content (etiquette with 4 sections, cuisine with 6 dishes, landmarks with 6 places, social life with 4 topics, plus 10 useful phrases). Youth page has 3 tabs (Courses with 4 demo courses showing progress, Design Lab with AI generator, Careers with 4 job listings). Kids page has 3 tabs (Games with 6 playable games, Heritage Box subscription, Achievements). All games work: Memory, Quiz, Word Scramble, Pattern Match, Coloring, Story Time.
passed_tests: Backend API /api/health returns healthy status
Backend API /api/content/tourists-guide returns complete data
Etiquette has 4 sections: greetings, diwaniya, dress, ramadan
Cuisine has 6 dishes: machboos, jireesh, margoog, gabout, harees, luqaimat
Landmarks has 6 places: Kuwait Towers, Grand Mosque, Mubarakiya Souq, Failaka Island, Sadu House, Liberation Tower
Social life has 4 topics: diwaniya, family gatherings, celebrations, coffee culture
Phrases has 10+ Kuwaiti expressions with pronunciation
Navigation dropdown menus (Sections and Explore) work correctly
Language switching (Arabic/English) works
Theme switching (Heritage/Modern) works
Dark mode toggle works
Mobile navigation menu works with all nav items
Tourist page loads with 4 category tabs
Youth page shows 3 tabs (Courses, Design Lab, Careers)
Youth courses show progress tracking (65%)
Youth careers show 4 job listings with Apply buttons

Memory game is playable with card matching

Kids Heritage Box subscription option visible
Kids Achievements tab with points tracking
